question.label: Nothing feels new
question.name: When you say 'nothing feels new' — what's missing most right now?
question.description: Clarifies whether the flatness is about challenge, ownership, or variety before moving on.

answer: I am proud of the migration plan and how we handled the cutover.

assessment.note: She pivoted from what feels missing to a concrete accomplishment, which signals some intact pride and investment even though it did not answer the gap directly.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Mentoring follow-through
new_queue.name: What would mentoring actually look like in your week?

new_queue.label: Support ask
new_queue.name: What do you need from me to keep the next two weeks moving cleanly?

new_queue.label: Close the loop
new_queue.name: Given what we covered, what’s the first thing you want to tighten up before we next meet?

history.answer_excerpt: The launch went well, but this week I feel flatter than I expected.
Mostly cleanup and reviews right now, not much that feels new.
I am proud of the migration plan and how we handled the cutover.
